1	"""v2-S03 sub-stage (g) — gated ensemble of M3-ICP-locked + C5_szp.
2	
3	Per-subject decision rule:
4	    Δd_med = final ICP d_med − iter0 ICP d_med
5	    If Δd_med < −5 µm  → ICP improved residual → use M3-ICP-locked pairs.
6	    Else                → fall back to C5_szp pairs.
7	
8	Validates the iter-3 hypothesis (oracle gate sum r@20 = 2.949 on 6
9	subjects) by re-running M3-ICP-locked for the gate signal and reading
10	C5_szp r@20 from `bench_a_szpinned_results.csv`.
11	
12	Outputs:
13	  bench_g_ensemble_results.csv      per-subject decision + chosen r@20
14	  bench_g_ensemble.log              per-row console output
15	"""
16	from __future__ import annotations
17	
18	import sys
19	import time
20	from pathlib import Path
21	
22	sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/lib")
23	sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/data/claude_data/full_automatic_execution_01")
24	sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/code/dev_code")
25	sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/data/claude_data/sessions/03c_onset_features/iterations")
26	
27	import pandas as pd
28	
29	import bench_harness_patch  # noqa: E402
30	bench_harness_patch.patch()
31	
32	from benchmark_data_loader import BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS, load_subject  # noqa: E402
33	from bench_a_szpinned import _load_sz_pins  # noqa: E402
34	from bench_e_m3_icp_szpinned import m3_icp_pairs  # noqa: E402
35	
36	OUT = Path("/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/sessions/v2_S03_revival_pass")
37	GATE_DELTA_UM = -5.0  # ICP must reduce d_med by > 5 µm to be trusted
38	
39	
40	def _c5_lookup() -> pd.DataFrame:
41	    df = pd.read_csv(OUT / "bench_a_szpinned_results.csv")
42	    return df[df.method == "C5"].set_index("subject_id")
43	
44	
45	def main():
46	    sz_pins = _load_sz_pins()
47	    c5 = _c5_lookup()
48	    print(f"sz pins (iter-7): {sz_pins}", flush=True)
49	    print(f"gate threshold: Δd_med < {GATE_DELTA_UM:.1f} µm → use M3-ICP",
50	          flush=True)
51	
52	    rows = []
53	    for sid in BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS:
54	        sz_pin = sz_pins[sid]
55	        print(f"\n=== {sid}  sz_pin={sz_pin:.3f} ===", flush=True)
56	        s = load_subject(sid)
57	        t0 = time.time()
58	        pairs_df, diag = m3_icp_pairs(s, sz_pin, verbose=False)
59	        dt = time.time() - t0
60	
61	        # Score M3-ICP via the patched harness compare_to_gt
62	        from bench.harness import compare_to_gt
63	        m3_scores = compare_to_gt(pairs_df, s)
64	        m3_r20 = float(m3_scores.get("recall_at_20um", 0.0))
65	        m3_r30 = float(m3_scores.get("recall_at_30um", 0.0))
66	
67	        # Gate signal
68	        hist = diag["history"]
69	        if not hist:
70	            d0 = d_final = float("nan")
71	            delta = float("nan")
72	        else:
73	            d0 = float(hist[0]["d_med"])
74	            d_final = float(hist[-1]["d_med"])
75	            delta = d_final - d0
76	        gate_pass = (not pd.isna(delta)) and (delta < GATE_DELTA_UM)
77	
78	        # C5 lookup
79	        c5_row = c5.loc[int(sid)] if int(sid) in c5.index else c5.loc[sid]
80	        c5_r20 = float(c5_row["recall_at_20um"])
81	        c5_r30 = float(c5_row["recall_at_30um"])
82	
83	        chosen_method = "M3_ICP_locked" if gate_pass else "C5_szp"
84	        chosen_r20 = m3_r20 if gate_pass else c5_r20
85	        chosen_r30 = m3_r30 if gate_pass else c5_r30
86	
87	        row = dict(
88	            subject_id=sid,
89	            sz_pin=sz_pin,
90	            d_med_iter0=d0,
91	            d_med_final=d_final,
92	            delta_d_med=delta,
93	            n_iters=diag["n_iters"],
94	            icp_converged=diag["converged"],
95	            gate_pass=gate_pass,
96	            chosen_method=chosen_method,
97	            ensemble_r20=chosen_r20,
98	            ensemble_r30=chosen_r30,
99	            m3_icp_r20=m3_r20,
100	            m3_icp_r30=m3_r30,
101	            c5_szp_r20=c5_r20,
102	            c5_szp_r30=c5_r30,
103	            runtime_s=round(dt, 2),
104	        )
105	        rows.append(row)
106	        print(
107	            f"  d_med {d0:.1f} → {d_final:.1f}  Δ={delta:+.1f}µm  "
108	            f"gate={'PASS' if gate_pass else 'FAIL'}  → {chosen_method}",
109	            flush=True,
110	        )
111	        print(
112	            f"  M3-ICP r@20={m3_r20:.3f}  C5_szp r@20={c5_r20:.3f}  "
113	            f"ensemble r@20={chosen_r20:.3f}",
114	            flush=True,
115	        )
116	
117	    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
118	    df.to_csv(OUT / "bench_g_ensemble_results.csv", index=False)
119	
120	    print("\n=== ensemble summary ===")
121	    cols = ["subject_id", "delta_d_med", "gate_pass", "chosen_method",
122	            "ensemble_r20", "m3_icp_r20", "c5_szp_r20"]
123	    print(df[cols].round(3).to_string(index=False))
124	    print(f"\nsum ensemble r@20: {df['ensemble_r20'].sum():.3f}")
125	    print(f"sum ensemble r@30: {df['ensemble_r30'].sum():.3f}")
126	    print(f"sum M3-ICP r@20:   {df['m3_icp_r20'].sum():.3f}")
127	    print(f"sum C5_szp r@20:   {df['c5_szp_r20'].sum():.3f}")
128	    print(f"oracle (max per subj) r@20: "
129	          f"{df[['m3_icp_r20', 'c5_szp_r20']].max(axis=1).sum():.3f}")
130	
131	
132	if __name__ == "__main__":
133	    main()
134

"""v2-S03 sub-stage (g) — gated ensemble of M3-ICP-locked + C5_szp.

Per-subject decision rule:
    Δd_med = final ICP d_med − iter0 ICP d_med
    If Δd_med < −5 µm  → ICP improved residual → use M3-ICP-locked pairs.
    Else                → fall back to C5_szp pairs.

Validates the iter-3 hypothesis (oracle gate sum r@20 = 2.949 on 6
subjects) by re-running M3-ICP-locked for the gate signal and reading
C5_szp r@20 from `bench_a_szpinned_results.csv`.

Outputs:
  bench_g_ensemble_results.csv      per-subject decision + chosen r@20
  bench_g_ensemble.log              per-row console output
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
import time
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/lib")
sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/data/claude_data/full_automatic_execution_01")
sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/code/dev_code")
sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/data/claude_data/sessions/03c_onset_features/iterations")

import pandas as pd

import bench_harness_patch  # noqa: E402
bench_harness_patch.patch()

from benchmark_data_loader import BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS, load_subject  # noqa: E402
from bench_a_szpinned import _load_sz_pins  # noqa: E402
from bench_e_m3_icp_szpinned import m3_icp_pairs  # noqa: E402

OUT = Path("/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/sessions/v2_S03_revival_pass")
GATE_DELTA_UM = -5.0  # ICP must reduce d_med by > 5 µm to be trusted


def _c5_lookup() -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = pd.read_csv(OUT / "bench_a_szpinned_results.csv")
    return df[df.method == "C5"].set_index("subject_id")


def main():
    sz_pins = _load_sz_pins()
    c5 = _c5_lookup()
    print(f"sz pins (iter-7): {sz_pins}", flush=True)
    print(f"gate threshold: Δd_med < {GATE_DELTA_UM:.1f} µm → use M3-ICP",
          flush=True)

    rows = []
    for sid in BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS:
        sz_pin = sz_pins[sid]
        print(f"\n=== {sid}  sz_pin={sz_pin:.3f} ===", flush=True)
        s = load_subject(sid)
        t0 = time.time()
        pairs_df, diag = m3_icp_pairs(s, sz_pin, verbose=False)
        dt = time.time() - t0

        # Score M3-ICP via the patched harness compare_to_gt
        from bench.harness import compare_to_gt
        m3_scores = compare_to_gt(pairs_df, s)
        m3_r20 = float(m3_scores.get("recall_at_20um", 0.0))
        m3_r30 = float(m3_scores.get("recall_at_30um", 0.0))

        # Gate signal
        hist = diag["history"]
        if not hist:
            d0 = d_final = float("nan")
            delta = float("nan")
        else:
            d0 = float(hist[0]["d_med"])
            d_final = float(hist[-1]["d_med"])
            delta = d_final - d0
        gate_pass = (not pd.isna(delta)) and (delta < GATE_DELTA_UM)

        # C5 lookup
        c5_row = c5.loc[int(sid)] if int(sid) in c5.index else c5.loc[sid]
        c5_r20 = float(c5_row["recall_at_20um"])
        c5_r30 = float(c5_row["recall_at_30um"])

        chosen_method = "M3_ICP_locked" if gate_pass else "C5_szp"
        chosen_r20 = m3_r20 if gate_pass else c5_r20
        chosen_r30 = m3_r30 if gate_pass else c5_r30

        row = dict(
            subject_id=sid,
            sz_pin=sz_pin,
            d_med_iter0=d0,
            d_med_final=d_final,
            delta_d_med=delta,
            n_iters=diag["n_iters"],
            icp_converged=diag["converged"],
            gate_pass=gate_pass,
            chosen_method=chosen_method,
            ensemble_r20=chosen_r20,
            ensemble_r30=chosen_r30,
            m3_icp_r20=m3_r20,
            m3_icp_r30=m3_r30,
            c5_szp_r20=c5_r20,
            c5_szp_r30=c5_r30,
            runtime_s=round(dt, 2),
        )
        rows.append(row)
        print(
            f"  d_med {d0:.1f} → {d_final:.1f}  Δ={delta:+.1f}µm  "
            f"gate={'PASS' if gate_pass else 'FAIL'}  → {chosen_method}",
            flush=True,
        )
        print(
            f"  M3-ICP r@20={m3_r20:.3f}  C5_szp r@20={c5_r20:.3f}  "
            f"ensemble r@20={chosen_r20:.3f}",
            flush=True,
        )

    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    df.to_csv(OUT / "bench_g_ensemble_results.csv", index=False)

    print("\n=== ensemble summary ===")
    cols = ["subject_id", "delta_d_med", "gate_pass", "chosen_method",
            "ensemble_r20", "m3_icp_r20", "c5_szp_r20"]
    print(df[cols].round(3).to_string(index=False))
    print(f"\nsum ensemble r@20: {df['ensemble_r20'].sum():.3f}")
    print(f"sum ensemble r@30: {df['ensemble_r30'].sum():.3f}")
    print(f"sum M3-ICP r@20:   {df['m3_icp_r20'].sum():.3f}")
    print(f"sum C5_szp r@20:   {df['c5_szp_r20'].sum():.3f}")
    print(f"oracle (max per subj) r@20: "
          f"{df[['m3_icp_r20', 'c5_szp_r20']].max(axis=1).sum():.3f}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.content:
1	"""Stage A — locked-prior warm-start.
2	
3	Consumes:
4	  - `surface_registration_v2.get_surface_registration(s)` — 2-D PWR fit on
5	    the raw 488 MIP. **Authoritative source of sxy** (PWR-affine
6	    `base_sxy * exp(d_log_scale)`) and of (t_x, t_y) plus a residual θ
7	    correction.
8	  - `surfaces_iter08.get_cz_surface_iter08`, `get_hcr_top_surface_iter07` —
9	    image-only pia surfaces; used for the tilt-residual rotation R_tilt and
10	    the t_z anchor (CZ pia mapped onto HCR pia at the CZ centroid xy).
11	
12	The per-cell xy-bbox area ratio (`roi_area_sxy`) is intentionally NOT
13	used here — it has known per-subject biases (e.g. 782149 −15 %) and is
14	only acceptable as a bootstrap initial guess for rigid registration.
15	
16	Pins all 7 affine DOF as a usable warm-start before any 3-D centroid
17	matching:
18	  R   = R_180 @ R_tilt @ R_pwr_θ
19	  s_x = s_y = sxy           (PWR-affine, image-NCC)
20	  s_z = HCR_mean_depth / CZ_mean_depth  (basin-correct prior; Stage B
21	       refines via image-NCC sweep before any sz-locking downstream)
22	  (t_x, t_y) from PWR rigid+affine + crop_bbox offset
23	  t_z so the warped CZ centroid mean lands on
24	       HCR_pia(x_hcr, y_hcr) + sz · CZ_centroid_mean_depth.
25	
26	API
27	---
28	* :class:`LockedPriorWarmStart` — dataclass with everything pinned.
29	* :func:`compute_locked_prior_warm_start(s)` — run from scratch.
30	* :func:`apply_to_cz_um(lp, cz_zyx_um)` — produce warped CZ centroids in HCR µm.
31	"""
32	from __future__ import annotations
33	
34	import math
35	import sys
36	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
37	from pathlib import Path
38	from typing import Optional
39	
40	import numpy as np
41	
42	_THIS = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
43	_DEV = _THIS.parent.parent / "dev_code"
44	_R1 = _THIS.parent.parent / "dev_code"
45	for _p in (_DEV, _R1):
46	    sp = str(_p)
47	    if sp not in sys.path:
48	        sys.path.insert(0, sp)
49	
50	from benchmark_data_loader import HCR_SEG_XY_DOWNSAMPLE  # noqa: E402,F401
51	from r1_revised import (  # noqa: E402
52	    _plane_normal_from_surface,
53	    _rotation_about_z_row,
54	    _rotation_between_row,
55	    _surface_z_at,
56	)
57	from surface_registration_v2 import get_surface_registration  # noqa: E402
58	from surfaces_iter08 import (  # noqa: E402
59	    get_cz_surface_iter08,
60	    get_hcr_top_surface_iter07,
61	)
62	
63	PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z = 180.0
64	
65	# Stage A's sz prior: HCR_mean_depth_below_pia / CZ_mean_depth_below_pia
66	# at the registered target. This puts the warped cloud in the same
67	# axial basin v1's ICP converges to. Stage B's image NCC sweep refines
68	# sz; this is just the initial guess so the LP is a usable warm-start.
69	SZ_INIT = "depth_ratio"
70	
71	
72	@dataclass
73	class LockedPriorWarmStart:
74	    """Pinned 7-DOF affine in (z, y, x) HCR µm convention.
75	
76	    Apply to a CZ centroid array shaped (N, 3) in (z, y, x) CZ µm via
77	    ``apply_to_cz_um``.  Compatible with the candidate convention in
78	    `bench/candidate_impls/_p1_teaser.py` etc.
79	    """
80	
81	    subject_id: str
82	    R: np.ndarray              # (3, 3) row-vec, applied AFTER mean-centering & scale
83	    scales: np.ndarray         # (3,) (sz, sy, sx) — note (z, y, x) order
84	    translation: np.ndarray    # (3,) (tz, ty, tx) — added LAST
85	    src_mean: np.ndarray       # (3,) CZ centroid mean (z, y, x) µm
86	    sxy_value: float
87	    sxy_source: str
88	    rotation_deg_z: float = 180.0
89	    pwr_ncc: float = 0.0
90	    pwr_method: str = ""
91	    diagnostics: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
92	
93	
94	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
95	# sxy resolution
96	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
97	def resolve_sxy(s, *, registration: dict | None = None) -> tuple[float, str]:
98	    """Return the PWR-affine sxy from `surface_registration_v2`.
99	
100	    For ALL 6 subjects the final sxy is the image-NCC-driven PWR fit:
101	    `base_sxy * exp(d_log_scale)`. The per-cell xy-bbox area ratio
102	    (`roi_area_sxy`) has known per-subject biases and is intentionally
103	    not consulted here — see feedback memory
104	    `feedback_sxy_source_of_truth`.
105	    """
106	    reg = registration if registration is not None else get_surface_registration(s)
107	    affine = reg["methods"].get("affine", {})
108	    params = affine.get("params") or [0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
109	    d_log_s = float(params[1])  # d_log_scale at stage2
110	    base_sxy = float(reg["sxy"])  # warm-start sxy used to render cz_warm
111	    sxy_img = base_sxy * math.exp(d_log_s)
112	    return sxy_img, "pwr_affine_sxy"
113	
114	
115	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
116	# (t_x, t_y) from the PWR rigid+affine offset, in HCR µm
117	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
118	def _affine_centroid_translation_um(
119	    s, reg: dict, sxy: float
120	) -> tuple[float, float, float, float]:
121	    """Apply the PWR rigid+affine 2-D fit to the CZ centroid mean and
122	    return (mean_x_hcr_um, mean_y_hcr_um, cz_mean_x_um, cz_mean_y_um),
123	    in absolute HCR µm (i.e. on the same frame as `s.hcr_centroids`
124	    converted via `hcr_xy_um`).
125	
126	    The pipeline used by `surface_registration_v2`:
127	
128	      cz_bin (CZ-px)          shape (H_b, W_b),  1 px = cz_xy_um µm
129	        ↓ nd_rotate 180° (reshape=True)            same shape
130	      rot           : (i, j) ↔ (H_b-1-i, W_b-1-j) in cz_bin
131	        ↓ zoom by f = cz_xy_um*sxy/hcr_xy_um
132	      cz_warm       shape (H_w, W_w),  1 px = hcr_xy_um µm
133	        ↓ M, offset (scipy: p_in_warm = M @ p_out_crop + offset)
134	      cropped HCR   1 px = hcr_xy_um µm, origin at crop_bbox[y0,x0]
135	        + [y0, x0] → HCR-full level-4 pixel grid
136	        × hcr_xy_um → absolute HCR µm.
137	    """
138	    cz_xy_um = float(s.cz_xy_um)
139	    hcr_xy_um = float(reg["hcr_xy_um"])
140	    cz_warm_h, cz_warm_w = reg["cz_warm_shape"]
141	    y0, _, x0, _ = reg["crop_bbox"]
142	
143	    f = (cz_xy_um * sxy) / hcr_xy_um  # cz_bin → cz_warm zoom factor
144	    # cz_bin shape recovered from cz_warm shape (round-trip through scipy.zoom)
145	    H_b = int(round(cz_warm_h / f))
146	    W_b = int(round(cz_warm_w / f))
147	
148	    cz = s.cz_centroids[["y_px", "x_px"]].to_numpy(float)
149	    cz_mean_y_um = float(cz[:, 0].mean()) * cz_xy_um
150	    cz_mean_x_um = float(cz[:, 1].mean()) * cz_xy_um
151	
152	    # 1. CZ µm → cz_bin px.
153	    y_b = cz_mean_y_um / cz_xy_um
154	    x_b = cz_mean_x_um / cz_xy_um
155	    # 2. 180° rotation about cz_bin centre.
156	    y_rot = (H_b - 1) - y_b
157	    x_rot = (W_b - 1) - x_b
158	    # 3. Zoom by f → cz_warm px.
159	    yr_pix = y_rot * f
160	    xr_pix = x_rot * f
161	
162	    # 4. Apply M, offset to get cropped-HCR px.  Prefer affine over rigid.
163	    method_key = "affine" if "affine" in reg["methods"] else "rigid"
164	    m = reg["methods"][method_key]
165	    M = np.asarray(m["M"], dtype=float)
166	    off = np.asarray(m["offset"], dtype=float)
167	    # scipy: p_in = M @ p_out + offset  →  p_out = M^{-1} (p_in - offset)
168	    p_in = np.array([yr_pix, xr_pix], dtype=float)
169	    p_out_crop = np.linalg.solve(M, p_in - off)
170	
171	    # 5. Add crop offset → HCR-full level-4 px → absolute HCR µm.
172	    y_hcr_um = (float(p_out_crop[0]) + y0) * hcr_xy_um
173	    x_hcr_um = (float(p_out_crop[1]) + x0) * hcr_xy_um
174	    return x_hcr_um, y_hcr_um, cz_mean_x_um, cz_mean_y_um
175	
176	
177	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
178	# (t_z) — anchor CZ pia onto HCR pia at the CZ centroid xy
179	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
180	def _cz_mean_depth_um(s, src_mean_zyx_um: np.ndarray, cz_surface: dict) -> float:
181	    """Mean CZ centroid depth (µm) below CZ pia at the centroid mean xy."""
182	    from benchmark_analysis import depth_from_surface
183	    cz_mean_xyz = src_mean_zyx_um[[2, 1, 0]]
184	    return float(depth_from_surface(cz_mean_xyz[None, :], cz_surface)[0])
185	
186	
187	def _hcr_mean_depth_um(s, hcr_surface: dict) -> float:
188	    """Mean HCR centroid depth (µm) below HCR pia, computed per-cell."""
189	    from benchmark_analysis import depth_from_surface
190	    hcr_xyz = np.column_stack([
191	        s.hcr_centroids["x_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
192	        s.hcr_centroids["y_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
193	        s.hcr_centroids["z_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_z_um),
194	    ])
195	    depths = depth_from_surface(hcr_xyz, hcr_surface)
196	    return float(np.nanmean(depths))
197	
198	
199	def _resolve_sz_init(
200	    sz_init,
201	    s,
202	    cz_surface: dict,
203	    hcr_surface: dict,
204	    src_mean_zyx_um: np.ndarray,
205	) -> tuple[float, str]:
206	    """Resolve the Stage-A sz prior. Returns (sz, source)."""
207	    if isinstance(sz_init, (int, float)):
208	        return float(sz_init), "fixed"
209	    if sz_init == "depth_ratio":
210	        cz_d = _cz_mean_depth_um(s, src_mean_zyx_um, cz_surface)
211	        hcr_d = _hcr_mean_depth_um(s, hcr_surface)
212	        if cz_d > 0:
213	            return float(hcr_d / cz_d), "depth_ratio"
214	        return 1.0, "depth_ratio_fallback"
215	    raise ValueError(f"Unknown sz_init: {sz_init!r}")
216	
217	
218	def _tz_at_pia(
219	    s, sxy: float, R: np.ndarray, src_mean_zyx_um: np.ndarray,
220	    cz_surface: dict, hcr_surface: dict,
221	    target_x_hcr_um: float, target_y_hcr_um: float,
222	    sz: float,
223	) -> float:
224	    """Choose t_z so the CZ centroid maps to the HCR pia at the registered
225	    (x_hcr, y_hcr).  In zyx convention the candidate consumer applies:
226	
227	        cz_warped = ((cz - src_mean) * scales) @ R.T + translation
228	
229	    with translation = (tz, ty, tx).  We want the predicted z of the
230	    centroid mean to equal hcr_pia(x_hcr, y_hcr) + sz * cz_mean_depth.
231	    """
232	    cz_mean_depth = _cz_mean_depth_um(s, src_mean_zyx_um, cz_surface)
233	    pia_z = float(_surface_z_at(
234	        hcr_surface,
235	        np.array([target_x_hcr_um]),
236	        np.array([target_y_hcr_um]),
237	    )[0])
238	    return pia_z + sz * cz_mean_depth
239	
240	
241	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
242	# top-level driver
243	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
244	def compute_locked_prior_warm_start(
245	    s,
246	    *,
247	    sz_init=SZ_INIT,
248	    use_pwr_residual_theta: bool = True,
249	    registration: dict | None = None,
250	) -> LockedPriorWarmStart:
251	    """Build the locked-prior warm-start for one subject.
252	
253	    Parameters
254	    ----------
255	    s
256	        ``SubjectData``.
257	    sz_init
258	        Initial sz (Stage B is what eventually sets it).  Default 1.0
259	        leaves the axial DOF for ICP to refine within Stage C bounds.
260	    use_pwr_residual_theta
261	        If True (default), incorporate the small θ residual recovered by
262	        the PWR rigid stage as an extra rotation about Z.
263	    registration
264	        Pre-computed ``surface_registration_v2`` dict; loaded from cache
265	        when None.
266	    """
267	    sid = s.subject_id
268	    if registration is None:
269	        registration = get_surface_registration(s)
270	
271	    # ---- Surfaces ----
272	    cz_surface = get_cz_surface_iter08(s)
273	    hcr_surface = get_hcr_top_surface_iter07(s)
274	
275	    # ---- sxy ----
276	    sxy, sxy_source = resolve_sxy(s, registration=registration)
277	
278	    # ---- R = R_180 @ R_tilt(cz_normal -> hcr_normal) [@ R_pwr_theta] ----
279	    cz_xy = np.column_stack([
280	        s.cz_centroids["x_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
281	        s.cz_centroids["y_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
282	    ])
283	    hcr_xy = np.column_stack([
284	        s.hcr_centroids["x_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
285	        s.hcr_centroids["y_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
286	    ])
287	    n_cz, _ = _plane_normal_from_surface(cz_surface, cz_xy)
288	    n_hcr, _ = _plane_normal_from_surface(hcr_surface, hcr_xy)
289	
290	    # Build R in xyz row-vec convention (matches the helpers + the surface
291	    # normals which are returned as (n_x, n_y, n_z)).
292	    R_180 = _rotation_about_z_row(PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z)
293	    n_cz_rot = n_cz @ R_180
294	    R_tilt = _rotation_between_row(n_cz_rot, n_hcr)
295	    R_xyz = R_180 @ R_tilt
296	    if use_pwr_residual_theta:
297	        theta_pwr = float(registration["methods"]["rigid"]["theta_deg"])
298	        # The PWR rigid theta is in the 2-D image plane; add it as a small
299	        # rotation about Z on top of the 180° flip.
300	        R_pwr = _rotation_about_z_row(theta_pwr)
301	        R_xyz = R_xyz @ R_pwr
302	        rot_deg_z = PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z + theta_pwr
303	    else:
304	        rot_deg_z = PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z
305	
306	    # Convert R to zyx row-vec so it matches src_mean / scales / translation
307	    # (all stored in zyx).  P is the anti-diagonal permutation; R_zyx =
308	    # P @ R_xyz @ P satisfies (v @ P) @ R_xyz @ P = v @ R_zyx, i.e. applying
309	    # R_zyx to a zyx row-vec yields the same rotation as R_xyz on the xyz
310	    # equivalent.  Without this conversion `apply_to_cz_um` was rotating
311	    # around the wrong axis (verified on 788406: median LP-vs-landmark error
312	    # 711 µm → 128 µm after the permutation).
313	    P = np.array([[0, 0, 1], [0, 1, 0], [1, 0, 0]], dtype=float)
314	    R = P @ R_xyz @ P
315	
316	    # ---- (t_x, t_y) from PWR rigid+affine ----
317	    x_hcr_target_um, y_hcr_target_um, _, _ = (
318	        _affine_centroid_translation_um(s, registration, sxy)
319	    )
320	
321	    # ---- src_mean (centroid mean in CZ µm, zyx) ----
322	    cz_zyx_px = s.cz_centroids[["z_px", "y_px", "x_px"]].to_numpy(float)
323	    src_mean_zyx = np.array([
324	        float(cz_zyx_px[:, 0].mean()) * float(s.cz_z_um),
325	        float(cz_zyx_px[:, 1].mean()) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
326	        float(cz_zyx_px[:, 2].mean()) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
327	    ])
328	
329	    # ---- sz prior (depth ratio) ----
330	    sz_value, sz_source = _resolve_sz_init(
331	        sz_init, s, cz_surface, hcr_surface, src_mean_zyx
332	    )
333	
334	    # ---- t_z so CZ pia → HCR pia ----
335	    tz = _tz_at_pia(
336	        s, sxy, R, src_mean_zyx, cz_surface, hcr_surface,
337	        x_hcr_target_um, y_hcr_target_um, sz_value,
338	    )
339	
340	    scales = np.array([sz_value, sxy, sxy], dtype=float)  # (sz, sy, sx)
341	    translation = np.array([tz, y_hcr_target_um, x_hcr_target_um])
342	
343	    return LockedPriorWarmStart(
344	        subject_id=sid,
345	        R=R,
346	        scales=scales,
347	        translation=translation,
348	        src_mean=src_mean_zyx,
349	        sxy_value=float(sxy),
350	        sxy_source=sxy_source,
351	        rotation_deg_z=float(rot_deg_z),
352	        pwr_ncc=float(registration["best_ncc"]),
353	        pwr_method=str(registration["best_method"]),
354	        diagnostics={
355	            "sz_init": float(sz_value),
356	            "sz_source": sz_source,
357	            "x_hcr_target_um": float(x_hcr_target_um),
358	            "y_hcr_target_um": float(y_hcr_target_um),
359	            "tz_um": float(tz),
360	            "n_cz_normal": n_cz.tolist(),
361	            "n_hcr_normal": n_hcr.tolist(),
362	            "use_pwr_residual_theta": bool(use_pwr_residual_theta),
363	            "pwr_rigid_theta_deg": float(
364	                registration["methods"]["rigid"]["theta_deg"]
365	            ),
366	        },
367	    )
368	
369	
370	def apply_to_cz_um(
371	    lp: LockedPriorWarmStart, cz_zyx_um: np.ndarray
372	) -> np.ndarray:
373	    """Warp CZ centroids to HCR µm using the locked-prior affine.
374	
375	    ``cz_zyx_um`` shape (N, 3), columns (z, y, x).  Returns same shape in
376	    HCR µm.  Convention matches the candidate's expectation:
377	
378	        cz_warped = ((cz_zyx - src_mean) * scales) @ R.T + translation
379	    """
380	    cz = np.asarray(cz_zyx_um, dtype=float)
381	    return ((cz - lp.src_mean) * lp.scales) @ lp.R.T + lp.translation
382	
383	
384	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
385	# CLI
386	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
387	if __name__ == "__main__":
388	    from benchmark_data_loader import BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS, load_subject
389	
390	    sids = sys.argv[1:] or list(BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS)
391	    for sid in sids:
392	        s = load_subject(sid)
393	        lp = compute_locked_prior_warm_start(s)
394	        print(
395	            f"{sid}  sxy={lp.sxy_value:.3f} ({lp.sxy_source})  "
396	            f"theta_z={lp.rotation_deg_z:.2f}°  "
397	            f"t=(z={lp.translation[0]:+.0f}, y={lp.translation[1]:+.0f}, "
398	            f"x={lp.translation[2]:+.0f}) µm  "
399	            f"pwr_ncc={lp.pwr_ncc:.3f} [{lp.pwr_method}]"
400	        )
401

file.content:
"""Stage A — locked-prior warm-start.

Consumes:
  - `surface_registration_v2.get_surface_registration(s)` — 2-D PWR fit on
    the raw 488 MIP. **Authoritative source of sxy** (PWR-affine
    `base_sxy * exp(d_log_scale)`) and of (t_x, t_y) plus a residual θ
    correction.
  - `surfaces_iter08.get_cz_surface_iter08`, `get_hcr_top_surface_iter07` —
    image-only pia surfaces; used for the tilt-residual rotation R_tilt and
    the t_z anchor (CZ pia mapped onto HCR pia at the CZ centroid xy).

The per-cell xy-bbox area ratio (`roi_area_sxy`) is intentionally NOT
used here — it has known per-subject biases (e.g. 782149 −15 %) and is
only acceptable as a bootstrap initial guess for rigid registration.

Pins all 7 affine DOF as a usable warm-start before any 3-D centroid
matching:
  R   = R_180 @ R_tilt @ R_pwr_θ
  s_x = s_y = sxy           (PWR-affine, image-NCC)
  s_z = HCR_mean_depth / CZ_mean_depth  (basin-correct prior; Stage B
       refines via image-NCC sweep before any sz-locking downstream)
  (t_x, t_y) from PWR rigid+affine + crop_bbox offset
  t_z so the warped CZ centroid mean lands on
       HCR_pia(x_hcr, y_hcr) + sz · CZ_centroid_mean_depth.

API
---
* :class:`LockedPriorWarmStart` — dataclass with everything pinned.
* :func:`compute_locked_prior_warm_start(s)` — run from scratch.
* :func:`apply_to_cz_um(lp, cz_zyx_um)` — produce warped CZ centroids in HCR µm.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import math
import sys
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional

import numpy as np

_THIS = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
_DEV = _THIS.parent.parent / "dev_code"
_R1 = _THIS.parent.parent / "dev_code"
for _p in (_DEV, _R1):
    sp = str(_p)
    if sp not in sys.path:
        sys.path.insert(0, sp)

from benchmark_data_loader import HCR_SEG_XY_DOWNSAMPLE  # noqa: E402,F401
from r1_revised import (  # noqa: E402
    _plane_normal_from_surface,
    _rotation_about_z_row,
    _rotation_between_row,
    _surface_z_at,
)
from surface_registration_v2 import get_surface_registration  # noqa: E402
from surfaces_iter08 import (  # noqa: E402
    get_cz_surface_iter08,
    get_hcr_top_surface_iter07,
)

PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z = 180.0

# Stage A's sz prior: HCR_mean_depth_below_pia / CZ_mean_depth_below_pia
# at the registered target. This puts the warped cloud in the same
# axial basin v1's ICP converges to. Stage B's image NCC sweep refines
# sz; this is just the initial guess so the LP is a usable warm-start.
SZ_INIT = "depth_ratio"


@dataclass
class LockedPriorWarmStart:
    """Pinned 7-DOF affine in (z, y, x) HCR µm convention.

    Apply to a CZ centroid array shaped (N, 3) in (z, y, x) CZ µm via
    ``apply_to_cz_um``.  Compatible with the candidate convention in
    `bench/candidate_impls/_p1_teaser.py` etc.
    """

    subject_id: str
    R: np.ndarray              # (3, 3) row-vec, applied AFTER mean-centering & scale
    scales: np.ndarray         # (3,) (sz, sy, sx) — note (z, y, x) order
    translation: np.ndarray    # (3,) (tz, ty, tx) — added LAST
    src_mean: np.ndarray       # (3,) CZ centroid mean (z, y, x) µm
    sxy_value: float
    sxy_source: str
    rotation_deg_z: float = 180.0
    pwr_ncc: float = 0.0
    pwr_method: str = ""
    diagnostics: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# sxy resolution
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
def resolve_sxy(s, *, registration: dict | None = None) -> tuple[float, str]:
    """Return the PWR-affine sxy from `surface_registration_v2`.

    For ALL 6 subjects the final sxy is the image-NCC-driven PWR fit:
    `base_sxy * exp(d_log_scale)`. The per-cell xy-bbox area ratio
    (`roi_area_sxy`) has known per-subject biases and is intentionally
    not consulted here — see feedback memory
    `feedback_sxy_source_of_truth`.
    """
    reg = registration if registration is not None else get_surface_registration(s)
    affine = reg["methods"].get("affine", {})
    params = affine.get("params") or [0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
    d_log_s = float(params[1])  # d_log_scale at stage2
    base_sxy = float(reg["sxy"])  # warm-start sxy used to render cz_warm
    sxy_img = base_sxy * math.exp(d_log_s)
    return sxy_img, "pwr_affine_sxy"


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# (t_x, t_y) from the PWR rigid+affine offset, in HCR µm
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
def _affine_centroid_translation_um(
    s, reg: dict, sxy: float
) -> tuple[float, float, float, float]:
    """Apply the PWR rigid+affine 2-D fit to the CZ centroid mean and
    return (mean_x_hcr_um, mean_y_hcr_um, cz_mean_x_um, cz_mean_y_um),
    in absolute HCR µm (i.e. on the same frame as `s.hcr_centroids`
    converted via `hcr_xy_um`).

    The pipeline used by `surface_registration_v2`:

      cz_bin (CZ-px)          shape (H_b, W_b),  1 px = cz_xy_um µm
        ↓ nd_rotate 180° (reshape=True)            same shape
      rot           : (i, j) ↔ (H_b-1-i, W_b-1-j) in cz_bin
        ↓ zoom by f = cz_xy_um*sxy/hcr_xy_um
      cz_warm       shape (H_w, W_w),  1 px = hcr_xy_um µm
        ↓ M, offset (scipy: p_in_warm = M @ p_out_crop + offset)
      cropped HCR   1 px = hcr_xy_um µm, origin at crop_bbox[y0,x0]
        + [y0, x0] → HCR-full level-4 pixel grid
        × hcr_xy_um → absolute HCR µm.
    """
    cz_xy_um = float(s.cz_xy_um)
    hcr_xy_um = float(reg["hcr_xy_um"])
    cz_warm_h, cz_warm_w = reg["cz_warm_shape"]
    y0, _, x0, _ = reg["crop_bbox"]

    f = (cz_xy_um * sxy) / hcr_xy_um  # cz_bin → cz_warm zoom factor
    # cz_bin shape recovered from cz_warm shape (round-trip through scipy.zoom)
    H_b = int(round(cz_warm_h / f))
    W_b = int(round(cz_warm_w / f))

    cz = s.cz_centroids[["y_px", "x_px"]].to_numpy(float)
    cz_mean_y_um = float(cz[:, 0].mean()) * cz_xy_um
    cz_mean_x_um = float(cz[:, 1].mean()) * cz_xy_um

    # 1. CZ µm → cz_bin px.
    y_b = cz_mean_y_um / cz_xy_um
    x_b = cz_mean_x_um / cz_xy_um
    # 2. 180° rotation about cz_bin centre.
    y_rot = (H_b - 1) - y_b
    x_rot = (W_b - 1) - x_b
    # 3. Zoom by f → cz_warm px.
    yr_pix = y_rot * f
    xr_pix = x_rot * f

    # 4. Apply M, offset to get cropped-HCR px.  Prefer affine over rigid.
    method_key = "affine" if "affine" in reg["methods"] else "rigid"
    m = reg["methods"][method_key]
    M = np.asarray(m["M"], dtype=float)
    off = np.asarray(m["offset"], dtype=float)
    # scipy: p_in = M @ p_out + offset  →  p_out = M^{-1} (p_in - offset)
    p_in = np.array([yr_pix, xr_pix], dtype=float)
    p_out_crop = np.linalg.solve(M, p_in - off)

    # 5. Add crop offset → HCR-full level-4 px → absolute HCR µm.
    y_hcr_um = (float(p_out_crop[0]) + y0) * hcr_xy_um
    x_hcr_um = (float(p_out_crop[1]) + x0) * hcr_xy_um
    return x_hcr_um, y_hcr_um, cz_mean_x_um, cz_mean_y_um


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# (t_z) — anchor CZ pia onto HCR pia at the CZ centroid xy
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
def _cz_mean_depth_um(s, src_mean_zyx_um: np.ndarray, cz_surface: dict) -> float:
    """Mean CZ centroid depth (µm) below CZ pia at the centroid mean xy."""
    from benchmark_analysis import depth_from_surface
    cz_mean_xyz = src_mean_zyx_um[[2, 1, 0]]
    return float(depth_from_surface(cz_mean_xyz[None, :], cz_surface)[0])


def _hcr_mean_depth_um(s, hcr_surface: dict) -> float:
    """Mean HCR centroid depth (µm) below HCR pia, computed per-cell."""
    from benchmark_analysis import depth_from_surface
    hcr_xyz = np.column_stack([
        s.hcr_centroids["x_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
        s.hcr_centroids["y_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
        s.hcr_centroids["z_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_z_um),
    ])
    depths = depth_from_surface(hcr_xyz, hcr_surface)
    return float(np.nanmean(depths))


def _resolve_sz_init(
    sz_init,
    s,
    cz_surface: dict,
    hcr_surface: dict,
    src_mean_zyx_um: np.ndarray,
) -> tuple[float, str]:
    """Resolve the Stage-A sz prior. Returns (sz, source)."""
    if isinstance(sz_init, (int, float)):
        return float(sz_init), "fixed"
    if sz_init == "depth_ratio":
        cz_d = _cz_mean_depth_um(s, src_mean_zyx_um, cz_surface)
        hcr_d = _hcr_mean_depth_um(s, hcr_surface)
        if cz_d > 0:
            return float(hcr_d / cz_d), "depth_ratio"
        return 1.0, "depth_ratio_fallback"
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown sz_init: {sz_init!r}")


def _tz_at_pia(
    s, sxy: float, R: np.ndarray, src_mean_zyx_um: np.ndarray,
    cz_surface: dict, hcr_surface: dict,
    target_x_hcr_um: float, target_y_hcr_um: float,
    sz: float,
) -> float:
    """Choose t_z so the CZ centroid maps to the HCR pia at the registered
    (x_hcr, y_hcr).  In zyx convention the candidate consumer applies:

        cz_warped = ((cz - src_mean) * scales) @ R.T + translation

    with translation = (tz, ty, tx).  We want the predicted z of the
    centroid mean to equal hcr_pia(x_hcr, y_hcr) + sz * cz_mean_depth.
    """
    cz_mean_depth = _cz_mean_depth_um(s, src_mean_zyx_um, cz_surface)
    pia_z = float(_surface_z_at(
        hcr_surface,
        np.array([target_x_hcr_um]),
        np.array([target_y_hcr_um]),
    )[0])
    return pia_z + sz * cz_mean_depth


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# top-level driver
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
def compute_locked_prior_warm_start(
    s,
    *,
    sz_init=SZ_INIT,
    use_pwr_residual_theta: bool = True,
    registration: dict | None = None,
) -> LockedPriorWarmStart:
    """Build the locked-prior warm-start for one subject.

    Parameters
    ----------
    s
        ``SubjectData``.
    sz_init
        Initial sz (Stage B is what eventually sets it).  Default 1.0
        leaves the axial DOF for ICP to refine within Stage C bounds.
    use_pwr_residual_theta
        If True (default), incorporate the small θ residual recovered by
        the PWR rigid stage as an extra rotation about Z.
    registration
        Pre-computed ``surface_registration_v2`` dict; loaded from cache
        when None.
    """
    sid = s.subject_id
    if registration is None:
        registration = get_surface_registration(s)

    # ---- Surfaces ----
    cz_surface = get_cz_surface_iter08(s)
    hcr_surface = get_hcr_top_surface_iter07(s)

    # ---- sxy ----
    sxy, sxy_source = resolve_sxy(s, registration=registration)

    # ---- R = R_180 @ R_tilt(cz_normal -> hcr_normal) [@ R_pwr_theta] ----
    cz_xy = np.column_stack([
        s.cz_centroids["x_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
        s.cz_centroids["y_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
    ])
    hcr_xy = np.column_stack([
        s.hcr_centroids["x_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
        s.hcr_centroids["y_px"].to_numpy(float) * float(s.hcr_xy_um),
    ])
    n_cz, _ = _plane_normal_from_surface(cz_surface, cz_xy)
    n_hcr, _ = _plane_normal_from_surface(hcr_surface, hcr_xy)

    # Build R in xyz row-vec convention (matches the helpers + the surface
    # normals which are returned as (n_x, n_y, n_z)).
    R_180 = _rotation_about_z_row(PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z)
    n_cz_rot = n_cz @ R_180
    R_tilt = _rotation_between_row(n_cz_rot, n_hcr)
    R_xyz = R_180 @ R_tilt
    if use_pwr_residual_theta:
        theta_pwr = float(registration["methods"]["rigid"]["theta_deg"])
        # The PWR rigid theta is in the 2-D image plane; add it as a small
        # rotation about Z on top of the 180° flip.
        R_pwr = _rotation_about_z_row(theta_pwr)
        R_xyz = R_xyz @ R_pwr
        rot_deg_z = PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z + theta_pwr
    else:
        rot_deg_z = PRIOR_ROTATION_DEG_Z

    # Convert R to zyx row-vec so it matches src_mean / scales / translation
    # (all stored in zyx).  P is the anti-diagonal permutation; R_zyx =
    # P @ R_xyz @ P satisfies (v @ P) @ R_xyz @ P = v @ R_zyx, i.e. applying
    # R_zyx to a zyx row-vec yields the same rotation as R_xyz on the xyz
    # equivalent.  Without this conversion `apply_to_cz_um` was rotating
    # around the wrong axis (verified on 788406: median LP-vs-landmark error
    # 711 µm → 128 µm after the permutation).
    P = np.array([[0, 0, 1], [0, 1, 0], [1, 0, 0]], dtype=float)
    R = P @ R_xyz @ P

    # ---- (t_x, t_y) from PWR rigid+affine ----
    x_hcr_target_um, y_hcr_target_um, _, _ = (
        _affine_centroid_translation_um(s, registration, sxy)
    )

    # ---- src_mean (centroid mean in CZ µm, zyx) ----
    cz_zyx_px = s.cz_centroids[["z_px", "y_px", "x_px"]].to_numpy(float)
    src_mean_zyx = np.array([
        float(cz_zyx_px[:, 0].mean()) * float(s.cz_z_um),
        float(cz_zyx_px[:, 1].mean()) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
        float(cz_zyx_px[:, 2].mean()) * float(s.cz_xy_um),
    ])

    # ---- sz prior (depth ratio) ----
    sz_value, sz_source = _resolve_sz_init(
        sz_init, s, cz_surface, hcr_surface, src_mean_zyx
    )

    # ---- t_z so CZ pia → HCR pia ----
    tz = _tz_at_pia(
        s, sxy, R, src_mean_zyx, cz_surface, hcr_surface,
        x_hcr_target_um, y_hcr_target_um, sz_value,
    )

    scales = np.array([sz_value, sxy, sxy], dtype=float)  # (sz, sy, sx)
    translation = np.array([tz, y_hcr_target_um, x_hcr_target_um])

    return LockedPriorWarmStart(
        subject_id=sid,
        R=R,
        scales=scales,
        translation=translation,
        src_mean=src_mean_zyx,
        sxy_value=float(sxy),
        sxy_source=sxy_source,
        rotation_deg_z=float(rot_deg_z),
        pwr_ncc=float(registration["best_ncc"]),
        pwr_method=str(registration["best_method"]),
        diagnostics={
            "sz_init": float(sz_value),
            "sz_source": sz_source,
            "x_hcr_target_um": float(x_hcr_target_um),
            "y_hcr_target_um": float(y_hcr_target_um),
            "tz_um": float(tz),
            "n_cz_normal": n_cz.tolist(),
            "n_hcr_normal": n_hcr.tolist(),
            "use_pwr_residual_theta": bool(use_pwr_residual_theta),
            "pwr_rigid_theta_deg": float(
                registration["methods"]["rigid"]["theta_deg"]
            ),
        },
    )


def apply_to_cz_um(
    lp: LockedPriorWarmStart, cz_zyx_um: np.ndarray
) -> np.ndarray:
    """Warp CZ centroids to HCR µm using the locked-prior affine.

    ``cz_zyx_um`` shape (N, 3), columns (z, y, x).  Returns same shape in
    HCR µm.  Convention matches the candidate's expectation:

        cz_warped = ((cz_zyx - src_mean) * scales) @ R.T + translation
    """
    cz = np.asarray(cz_zyx_um, dtype=float)
    return ((cz - lp.src_mean) * lp.scales) @ lp.R.T + lp.translation


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# CLI
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
if __name__ == "__main__":
    from benchmark_data_loader import BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS, load_subject

    sids = sys.argv[1:] or list(BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS)
    for sid in sids:
        s = load_subject(sid)
        lp = compute_locked_prior_warm_start(s)
        print(
            f"{sid}  sxy={lp.sxy_value:.3f} ({lp.sxy_source})  "
            f"theta_z={lp.rotation_deg_z:.2f}°  "
            f"t=(z={lp.translation[0]:+.0f}, y={lp.translation[1]:+.0f}, "
            f"x={lp.translation[2]:+.0f}) µm  "
            f"pwr_ncc={lp.pwr_ncc:.3f} [{lp.pwr_method}]"
        )

123	                        recall_at_20um=float(r.get("recall_at_20um", 0)),
124	                        recall_at_30um=float(r.get("recall_at_30um", 0)),
125	                        median_error_um=float(r.get("median_error_um",
126	                                                     float("nan"))),
127	                        sz_pin=sz_pin,
128	                        runtime_s=round(dt, 1),
129	                    )
130	                    rows.append(row)
131	                    print(
132	                        f"  {mid:3s}: r@10={row['recall_at_10um']:.3f} "
133	                        f"r@20={row['recall_at_20um']:.3f} "
134	                        f"r@30={row['recall_at_30um']:.3f} "
135	                        f"n={row['n_pred']:4d} "
136	                        f"med={row['median_error_um']:.1f}µm "
137	                        f"({dt:.0f}s)",
138	                        flush=True,
139	                    )
140	                except Exception as e:
141	                    print(f"  {mid:3s} FAILED: {type(e).__name__}: {e}",
142	                          flush=True)
143	                    rows.append(dict(
144	                        subject_id=sid, method=mid, n_pred=0,
145	                        recall_at_5um=0.0, recall_at_10um=0.0,
146	                        recall_at_20um=0.0, recall_at_30um=0.0,
147	                        median_error_um=float("nan"),
148	                        sz_pin=sz_pin,
149	                        runtime_s=round(time.time() - t0, 1),
150	                        error=f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}",
151	                    ))
152	        finally:
153	            ch.default_warmstart_zyx = original
154	
155	    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
156	    df.to_csv(OUT / "bench_a_szpinned_results.csv", index=False)
157	    print("\n=== summary (r@20) ===")
158	    pivot_r20 = df.pivot(index="subject_id", columns="method",
159	                          values="recall_at_20um")
160	    print(pivot_r20.round(3).to_string())
161	    print(f"\nsum r@20: {pivot_r20.sum().round(3).to_dict()}")
162	    print("\n=== summary (r@30) ===")
163	    pivot_r30 = df.pivot(index="subject_id", columns="method",
164	                          values="recall_at_30um")
165	    print(pivot_r30.round(3).to_string())
166	    print(f"\nsum r@30: {pivot_r30.sum().round(3).to_dict()}")
167	
168	
169	if __name__ == "__main__":
170	    main()
171

file.content:
"""v2-S03 sub-stage (a) RE-RUN with v2-S02 iter-7 sz pinned per subject.

Same dispatch as `bench_a_p1_p4_p6_c5.py`, but:
  1. The locked-prior warm-start is built with `sz_init = sz_peak` from
     `../../v2_S02_sz_image_sweep/results_iter7_summary.csv` instead of
     the depth-ratio default. This fixes the 788406 regression (LP's
     depth-ratio sz_init = 3.60 was 28 % above GT 2.82).
  2. `bench_harness_patch` is installed so the harness reports
     `recall_at_30um` (the v1 harness only computed r@5/10/20).

Outputs:
  bench_a_szpinned_results.csv  per-method × per-subject + r@30
  bench_a_szpinned.log          per-row console output
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
import time
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/lib")
sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/data/claude_data/full_automatic_execution_01")
sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/code/dev_code")
sys.path.insert(0, "/root/capsule/data/claude_data/sessions/03c_onset_features/iterations")

import pandas as pd

import bench_harness_patch  # noqa: E402  — must import before any harness call
bench_harness_patch.patch()

from benchmark_data_loader import BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS, load_subject  # noqa: E402
from locked_prior_warm import (  # noqa: E402
    apply_to_cz_um,
    compute_locked_prior_warm_start,
)

OUT = Path("/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/sessions/v2_S03_revival_pass")
SZ_TABLE = (
    Path("/root/capsule/code/full_automatic_execution_02/sessions/v2_S02_sz_image_sweep")
    / "results_iter7_summary.csv"
)
METHODS = ["P1", "P4", "P6", "C5"]


def _load_sz_pins() -> dict[str, float]:
    df = pd.read_csv(SZ_TABLE)
    df["subject_id"] = df["subject_id"].astype(str)
    return dict(zip(df["subject_id"], df["sz_peak"].astype(float)))


def patch_warmstart_sz_pinned(s, sz_pin: float):
    """Like bench_a_p1_p4_p6_c5.patch_warmstart_to_locked_prior, but
    builds the locked-prior with `sz_init = sz_pin`."""
    import lib.centroid_helpers as ch

    lp = compute_locked_prior_warm_start(s, sz_init=sz_pin)
    original = ch.default_warmstart_zyx

    def _locked(cz_um_zyx, hcr_um_zyx, **_kw):
        cz_init = apply_to_cz_um(lp, cz_um_zyx)
        info = dict(
            warmstart_kind="locked_prior_sz_pinned",
            sxy_value=float(lp.sxy_value),
            sxy_source=str(lp.sxy_source),
            sz_value=float(lp.scales[0]),
            sz_source=str(lp.diagnostics.get("sz_source", "")),
            translation_zyx=lp.translation.tolist(),
            rotation_deg_z=float(lp.rotation_deg_z),
            pwr_ncc=float(lp.pwr_ncc),
            pwr_method=str(lp.pwr_method),
        )
        return cz_init, info

    ch.default_warmstart_zyx = _locked
    return original, lp


def main():
    from bench.harness import run_candidate  # noqa: E402
    import bench.candidates  # noqa: F401, E402
    import lib.centroid_helpers as ch

    sz_pins = _load_sz_pins()
    print(f"sz pins (iter-7): {sz_pins}", flush=True)

    rows = []
    for sid in BENCHMARK_SUBJECTS:
        sz_pin = sz_pins[sid]
        print(f"\n=== {sid}  sz_pin={sz_pin:.3f} ===", flush=True)
        s = load_subject(sid)
        original, lp = patch_warmstart_sz_pinned(s, sz_pin)
        print(
            f"  LP sxy={lp.sxy_value:.3f} sz={lp.scales[0]:.3f} "
            f"(source={lp.diagnostics.get('sz_source', '')}) "
            f"theta_z={lp.rotation_deg_z:.2f}° "
            f"t=(z={lp.translation[0]:+.0f}, y={lp.translation[1]:+.0f}, "
            f"x={lp.translation[2]:+.0f}) "
            f"pwr_ncc={lp.pwr_ncc:.3f} [{lp.pwr_method}]",
            flush=True,
        )
        try:
            for mid in METHODS:
                t0 = time.time()
                try:
                    extra = (
                        dict(method="auto", sparse_threshold=10_000,
                             dense_threshold=20_000, verbose=False)
                        if mid == "C5"
                        else dict()
                    )
                    r = run_candidate(mid, sid, write_csv=False,
                                      extra_kwargs=extra)
                    dt = time.time() - t0
                    if r.get("error"):
                        print(f"  {mid:3s} swallowed error: {r['error'].splitlines()[0]}",
                              flush=True)
                    row = dict(
                        subject_id=sid,
                        method=mid,
                        n_pred=int(r.get("n_pred", 0)),
                        recall_at_5um=float(r.get("recall_at_5um", 0)),
                        recall_at_10um=float(r.get("recall_at_10um", 0)),
                        recall_at_20um=float(r.get("recall_at_20um", 0)),
                        recall_at_30um=float(r.get("recall_at_30um", 0)),
                        median_error_um=float(r.get("median_error_um",
                                                     float("nan"))),
                        sz_pin=sz_pin,
                        runtime_s=round(dt, 1),
                    )
                    rows.append(row)
                    print(
                        f"  {mid:3s}: r@10={row['recall_at_10um']:.3f} "
                        f"r@20={row['recall_at_20um']:.3f} "
                        f"r@30={row['recall_at_30um']:.3f} "
                        f"n={row['n_pred']:4d} "
                        f"med={row['median_error_um']:.1f}µm "
                        f"({dt:.0f}s)",
                        flush=True,
                    )
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"  {mid:3s} FAILED: {type(e).__name__}: {e}",
                          flush=True)
                    rows.append(dict(
                        subject_id=sid, method=mid, n_pred=0,
                        recall_at_5um=0.0, recall_at_10um=0.0,
                        recall_at_20um=0.0, recall_at_30um=0.0,
                        median_error_um=float("nan"),
                        sz_pin=sz_pin,
                        runtime_s=round(time.time() - t0, 1),
                        error=f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}",
                    ))
        finally:
            ch.default_warmstart_zyx = original

    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    df.to_csv(OUT / "bench_a_szpinned_results.csv", index=False)
    print("\n=== summary (r@20) ===")
    pivot_r20 = df.pivot(index="subject_id", columns="method",
                          values="recall_at_20um")
    print(pivot_r20.round(3).to_string())
    print(f"\nsum r@20: {pivot_r20.sum().round(3).to_dict()}")
    print("\n=== summary (r@30) ===")
    pivot_r30 = df.pivot(index="subject_id", columns="method",
                          values="recall_at_30um")
    print(pivot_r30.round(3).to_string())
    print(f"\nsum r@30: {pivot_r30.sum().round(3).to_dict()}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.content:
1	"""P1 — TEASER++ outlier-robust affine.
2	
3	Uses `teaserpp_python` if available, otherwise falls back to a GNC-TLS-style
4	scheme implemented on top of scipy: repeated anisotropic-affine fits on the
5	inlier set with truncated-least-squares weights updated each iteration.  The
6	fallback is documented in the sessions/03 log as an acceptable stand-in when
7	TEASER is unavailable.
8	
9	The output includes:
10	- coreg table,
11	- inlier label + TLS weight = intrinsic confidence,
12	- final anisotropic affine + TPS refinement over inliers.
13	"""
14	from __future__ import annotations
15	
16	import sys
17	from pathlib import Path
18	
19	import numpy as np
20	import pandas as pd
21	from scipy.optimize import linear_sum_assignment
22	from scipy.spatial.distance import cdist
23	from scipy.interpolate import Rbf
24	
25	_THIS = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
26	_ROOT = _THIS.parent.parent
27	if str(_ROOT) not in sys.path:
28	    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT))
29	if str(_ROOT.parent / "dev_code") not in sys.path:
30	    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT.parent / "dev_code"))
31	
32	from bench.harness import register_candidate, CoregResult, TransformDescriptor
33	from lib.cell_features import extract_cell_features, invariant_feature_mask
34	from lib.centroid_helpers import centroids_um, apply_aniso_fit
35	from benchmark_analysis import fit_anisotropic_similarity
36	
37	try:  # TEASER is optional
38	    import teaserpp_python  # type: ignore
39	    _HAS_TEASER = True
40	except Exception:
41	    _HAS_TEASER = False
42	
43	
44	def _seed_putative(cz_um, hcr_um, Fcn, Fgn, K=5, *, hcr_quality=None, beta=0.0):
45	    D = cdist(cz_um, hcr_um)
46	    cosS = Fcn @ Fgn.T
47	    score = D - 25.0 * cosS
48	    if hcr_quality is not None and beta:
49	        score = score - float(beta) * hcr_quality[None, :]
50	    order = np.argsort(score, axis=1)[:, :K]
51	    return order, D, cosS
52	
53	
54	def _gnc_tls(A, B, c_bar=15.0, mu=1.4, n_iter=50):
55	    """Graduated non-convexity TLS over an anisotropic affine.
56	
57	    A, B: (N, 3) putative paired points.  Returns (fit, weights, inliers).
58	    """
59	    N = len(A)
60	    w = np.ones(N)
61	    mu_t = 1e-4
62	    fit = None
63	    for _ in range(n_iter):
64	        if w.sum() < 4:
65	            break
66	        sel = w > 1e-3
67	        try:
68	            fit = fit_anisotropic_similarity(A[sel], B[sel])
69	        except Exception:
70	            break
71	        # residual under the fit, applied to ALL putatives (not just current selected).
72	        B_pred = apply_aniso_fit(A, fit)
73	        r2 = np.sum((B_pred - B) ** 2, axis=1)
74	        c_bar2 = c_bar ** 2
75	        # TLS weight: wi = (mu_t * c_bar^2 / (r2 + mu_t * c_bar^2))^2
76	        w_new = (mu_t * c_bar2 / (r2 + mu_t * c_bar2)) ** 2
77	        if np.allclose(w_new, w, atol=1e-4):
78	            w = w_new
79	            break
80	        w = w_new
81	        mu_t = min(1.0, mu_t * mu)
82	    if fit is None:
83	        # Fallback identity
84	        return None, np.zeros(N), np.zeros(N, bool)
85	    B_pred = apply_aniso_fit(A, fit)
86	    r = np.linalg.norm(B_pred - B, axis=1)
87	    inliers = r < c_bar
88	    return fit, w, inliers
89	
90	
91	@register_candidate("P1")
92	def run_p1(s, *, K=5, c_bar=15.0, cz_init=None, hcr_quality_beta: float = 5.0) -> CoregResult:
93	    cz_um, cz_ids = centroids_um(s, "cz")
94	    hcr_um, hcr_ids = centroids_um(s, "hcr_gfp")
95	
96	    if cz_init is None:
97	        from lib.centroid_helpers import default_warmstart_zyx
98	        cz_init, _ws = default_warmstart_zyx(cz_um, hcr_um)
99	        cz_c = cz_um.mean(0); hcr_c = hcr_um.mean(0)
100	        R0 = np.array([[1, 0, 0], [0, -1, 0], [0, 0, -1]], float)
101	    else:
102	        cz_init = np.asarray(cz_init, dtype=float)
103	        assert cz_init.shape == cz_um.shape
104	        cz_c = cz_um.mean(0); hcr_c = hcr_um.mean(0)
105	        R0 = np.array([[1, 0, 0], [0, -1, 0], [0, 0, -1]], float)
106	
107	    Fc, names, _ = extract_cell_features(s, "cz")
108	    Fg, _, _ = extract_cell_features(s, "hcr_gfp")
109	    inv = invariant_feature_mask(names)
110	    keep = inv & ~np.isnan(Fc).any(0) & ~np.isnan(Fg).any(0)
111	    mu = np.nanmean(Fg[:, keep], 0); sd = np.nanstd(Fg[:, keep], 0) + 1e-6
112	    Fcn = (Fc[:, keep] - mu) / sd
113	    Fgn = (Fg[:, keep] - mu) / sd
114	    Fcn = Fcn / (np.linalg.norm(Fcn, axis=1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)
115	    Fgn = Fgn / (np.linalg.norm(Fgn, axis=1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)
116	
117	    hq = None
118	    if hcr_quality_beta:
119	        from lib.image_quality import hcr_quality as _hcr_quality
120	        hq = _hcr_quality(s)
121	    order, D, cosS = _seed_putative(cz_init, hcr_um, Fcn, Fgn, K=K,
122	                                     hcr_quality=hq, beta=hcr_quality_beta)
123	    # Build putative correspondence list (cz_idx, hcr_idx).
124	    pair_cz, pair_hcr = [], []
125	    for i in range(len(cz_init)):
126	        for j in order[i]:
127	            pair_cz.append(i); pair_hcr.append(int(j))
128	    A = cz_init[pair_cz]
129	    B = hcr_um[pair_hcr]
130	
131	    fit, w, inliers = _gnc_tls(A, B, c_bar=c_bar)
132	    if fit is None:
133	        return CoregResult(pd.DataFrame(), 0.0,
134	                            diagnostics={"error": "gnc_tls_failed"})
135	
136	    # Apply the fit to ALL CZ cells and select best per-cell inlier.
137	    B_pred = apply_aniso_fit(cz_init, fit)
138	
139	    # TPS refinement over inliers
140	    inl_A = A[inliers]; inl_B = B[inliers]
141	    if len(inl_A) >= 8:
142	        try:
143	            # TPS residual on all CZ
144	            deltas = np.zeros_like(B_pred)
145	            # Input points for TPS are the affine-predicted CZ positions (so we warp
146	            # the residual into alignment with the observed HCR points).
147	            src = apply_aniso_fit(inl_A, fit)
148	            dst = inl_B - src  # residual
149	            for axis in range(3):
150	                rbf = Rbf(src[:, 0], src[:, 1], src[:, 2], dst[:, axis],
151	                          function="thin_plate", smooth=1.0)
152	                deltas[:, axis] = rbf(B_pred[:, 0], B_pred[:, 1], B_pred[:, 2])
153	            B_pred_tps = B_pred + deltas
154	        except Exception:
155	            B_pred_tps = B_pred
156	    else:
157	        B_pred_tps = B_pred
158	
159	    # For each CZ cell, pick best HCR (within search radius) from the putatives.
160	    rows = []
161	    for i in range(len(cz_init)):
162	        # Among putative j's for this i, pick one with smallest |B_pred_tps[i] - hcr_um[j]|
163	        js = order[i]
164	        d = np.linalg.norm(B_pred_tps[i][None] - hcr_um[js], axis=1)
165	        k = int(np.argmin(d))
166	        j = int(js[k])
167	        r = float(d[k])
168	        cos = float(cosS[i, j])
169	        cert = (r < c_bar)
170	        conf = (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp((r - c_bar * 0.66) / (c_bar * 0.33)))) * (0.5 + 0.5 * cos)
171	        rows.append(dict(
172	            cz_id=int(cz_ids[i]), hcr_id=int(hcr_ids[j]),
173	            confidence=float(conf),
174	            residual_um=r, cos_sim=cos, certified=bool(cert),
175	            cz_x_um=float(cz_um[i, 2]), cz_y_um=float(cz_um[i, 1]), cz_z_um=float(cz_um[i, 0]),
176	            hcr_x_um=float(hcr_um[j, 2]), hcr_y_um=float(hcr_um[j, 1]), hcr_z_um=float(hcr_um[j, 0]),
177	        ))
178	    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
179	    # One-to-one: if two CZs claim the same HCR, keep the higher-confidence one.
180	    if len(df):
181	        df = df.sort_values("confidence", ascending=False)
182	        df = df.drop_duplicates("hcr_id", keep="first")
183	        df = df.sort_values("cz_id").reset_index(drop=True)
184	
185	    transform = TransformDescriptor(
186	        R=fit.R, scales=fit.scales, translation=fit.translation, src_mean=np.zeros(3),
187	        rotation_deg_z=180.0, kind="aniso-affine+tps",
188	    )
189	    return CoregResult(
190	        pairs_df=df,
191	        confidence=float(df["confidence"].median()) if len(df) else 0.0,
192	        transform=transform,
193	        diagnostics=dict(
194	            has_teaser=_HAS_TEASER,
195	            n_inliers=int(inliers.sum()),
196	            n_putative=int(len(A)),
197	            c_bar=c_bar,
198	            scales=fit.scales.tolist(),
199	            hcr_quality_beta=float(hcr_quality_beta),
200	        ),
201	    )
202

file.content:
"""P1 — TEASER++ outlier-robust affine.

Uses `teaserpp_python` if available, otherwise falls back to a GNC-TLS-style
scheme implemented on top of scipy: repeated anisotropic-affine fits on the
inlier set with truncated-least-squares weights updated each iteration.  The
fallback is documented in the sessions/03 log as an acceptable stand-in when
TEASER is unavailable.

The output includes:
- coreg table,
- inlier label + TLS weight = intrinsic confidence,
- final anisotropic affine + TPS refinement over inliers.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from scipy.optimize import linear_sum_assignment
from scipy.spatial.distance import cdist
from scipy.interpolate import Rbf

_THIS = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
_ROOT = _THIS.parent.parent
if str(_ROOT) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT))
if str(_ROOT.parent / "dev_code") not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT.parent / "dev_code"))

from bench.harness import register_candidate, CoregResult, TransformDescriptor
from lib.cell_features import extract_cell_features, invariant_feature_mask
from lib.centroid_helpers import centroids_um, apply_aniso_fit
from benchmark_analysis import fit_anisotropic_similarity

try:  # TEASER is optional
    import teaserpp_python  # type: ignore
    _HAS_TEASER = True
except Exception:
    _HAS_TEASER = False


def _seed_putative(cz_um, hcr_um, Fcn, Fgn, K=5, *, hcr_quality=None, beta=0.0):
    D = cdist(cz_um, hcr_um)
    cosS = Fcn @ Fgn.T
    score = D - 25.0 * cosS
    if hcr_quality is not None and beta:
        score = score - float(beta) * hcr_quality[None, :]
    order = np.argsort(score, axis=1)[:, :K]
    return order, D, cosS


def _gnc_tls(A, B, c_bar=15.0, mu=1.4, n_iter=50):
    """Graduated non-convexity TLS over an anisotropic affine.

    A, B: (N, 3) putative paired points.  Returns (fit, weights, inliers).
    """
    N = len(A)
    w = np.ones(N)
    mu_t = 1e-4
    fit = None
    for _ in range(n_iter):
        if w.sum() < 4:
            break
        sel = w > 1e-3
        try:
            fit = fit_anisotropic_similarity(A[sel], B[sel])
        except Exception:
            break
        # residual under the fit, applied to ALL putatives (not just current selected).
        B_pred = apply_aniso_fit(A, fit)
        r2 = np.sum((B_pred - B) ** 2, axis=1)
        c_bar2 = c_bar ** 2
        # TLS weight: wi = (mu_t * c_bar^2 / (r2 + mu_t * c_bar^2))^2
        w_new = (mu_t * c_bar2 / (r2 + mu_t * c_bar2)) ** 2
        if np.allclose(w_new, w, atol=1e-4):
            w = w_new
            break
        w = w_new
        mu_t = min(1.0, mu_t * mu)
    if fit is None:
        # Fallback identity
        return None, np.zeros(N), np.zeros(N, bool)
    B_pred = apply_aniso_fit(A, fit)
    r = np.linalg.norm(B_pred - B, axis=1)
    inliers = r < c_bar
    return fit, w, inliers


@register_candidate("P1")
def run_p1(s, *, K=5, c_bar=15.0, cz_init=None, hcr_quality_beta: float = 5.0) -> CoregResult:
    cz_um, cz_ids = centroids_um(s, "cz")
    hcr_um, hcr_ids = centroids_um(s, "hcr_gfp")

    if cz_init is None:
        from lib.centroid_helpers import default_warmstart_zyx
        cz_init, _ws = default_warmstart_zyx(cz_um, hcr_um)
        cz_c = cz_um.mean(0); hcr_c = hcr_um.mean(0)
        R0 = np.array([[1, 0, 0], [0, -1, 0], [0, 0, -1]], float)
    else:
        cz_init = np.asarray(cz_init, dtype=float)
        assert cz_init.shape == cz_um.shape
        cz_c = cz_um.mean(0); hcr_c = hcr_um.mean(0)
        R0 = np.array([[1, 0, 0], [0, -1, 0], [0, 0, -1]], float)

    Fc, names, _ = extract_cell_features(s, "cz")
    Fg, _, _ = extract_cell_features(s, "hcr_gfp")
    inv = invariant_feature_mask(names)
    keep = inv & ~np.isnan(Fc).any(0) & ~np.isnan(Fg).any(0)
    mu = np.nanmean(Fg[:, keep], 0); sd = np.nanstd(Fg[:, keep], 0) + 1e-6
    Fcn = (Fc[:, keep] - mu) / sd
    Fgn = (Fg[:, keep] - mu) / sd
    Fcn = Fcn / (np.linalg.norm(Fcn, axis=1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)
    Fgn = Fgn / (np.linalg.norm(Fgn, axis=1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)

    hq = None
    if hcr_quality_beta:
        from lib.image_quality import hcr_quality as _hcr_quality
        hq = _hcr_quality(s)
    order, D, cosS = _seed_putative(cz_init, hcr_um, Fcn, Fgn, K=K,
                                     hcr_quality=hq, beta=hcr_quality_beta)
    # Build putative correspondence list (cz_idx, hcr_idx).
    pair_cz, pair_hcr = [], []
    for i in range(len(cz_init)):
        for j in order[i]:
            pair_cz.append(i); pair_hcr.append(int(j))
    A = cz_init[pair_cz]
    B = hcr_um[pair_hcr]

    fit, w, inliers = _gnc_tls(A, B, c_bar=c_bar)
    if fit is None:
        return CoregResult(pd.DataFrame(), 0.0,
                            diagnostics={"error": "gnc_tls_failed"})

    # Apply the fit to ALL CZ cells and select best per-cell inlier.
    B_pred = apply_aniso_fit(cz_init, fit)

    # TPS refinement over inliers
    inl_A = A[inliers]; inl_B = B[inliers]
    if len(inl_A) >= 8:
        try:
            # TPS residual on all CZ
            deltas = np.zeros_like(B_pred)
            # Input points for TPS are the affine-predicted CZ positions (so we warp
            # the residual into alignment with the observed HCR points).
            src = apply_aniso_fit(inl_A, fit)
            dst = inl_B - src  # residual
            for axis in range(3):
                rbf = Rbf(src[:, 0], src[:, 1], src[:, 2], dst[:, axis],
                          function="thin_plate", smooth=1.0)
                deltas[:, axis] = rbf(B_pred[:, 0], B_pred[:, 1], B_pred[:, 2])
            B_pred_tps = B_pred + deltas
        except Exception:
            B_pred_tps = B_pred
    else:
        B_pred_tps = B_pred

    # For each CZ cell, pick best HCR (within search radius) from the putatives.
    rows = []
    for i in range(len(cz_init)):
        # Among putative j's for this i, pick one with smallest |B_pred_tps[i] - hcr_um[j]|
        js = order[i]
        d = np.linalg.norm(B_pred_tps[i][None] - hcr_um[js], axis=1)
        k = int(np.argmin(d))
        j = int(js[k])
        r = float(d[k])
        cos = float(cosS[i, j])
        cert = (r < c_bar)
        conf = (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp((r - c_bar * 0.66) / (c_bar * 0.33)))) * (0.5 + 0.5 * cos)
        rows.append(dict(
            cz_id=int(cz_ids[i]), hcr_id=int(hcr_ids[j]),
            confidence=float(conf),
            residual_um=r, cos_sim=cos, certified=bool(cert),
            cz_x_um=float(cz_um[i, 2]), cz_y_um=float(cz_um[i, 1]), cz_z_um=float(cz_um[i, 0]),
            hcr_x_um=float(hcr_um[j, 2]), hcr_y_um=float(hcr_um[j, 1]), hcr_z_um=float(hcr_um[j, 0]),
        ))
    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    # One-to-one: if two CZs claim the same HCR, keep the higher-confidence one.
    if len(df):
        df = df.sort_values("confidence", ascending=False)
        df = df.drop_duplicates("hcr_id", keep="first")
        df = df.sort_values("cz_id").reset_index(drop=True)

    transform = TransformDescriptor(
        R=fit.R, scales=fit.scales, translation=fit.translation, src_mean=np.zeros(3),
        rotation_deg_z=180.0, kind="aniso-affine+tps",
    )
    return CoregResult(
        pairs_df=df,
        confidence=float(df["confidence"].median()) if len(df) else 0.0,
        transform=transform,
        diagnostics=dict(
            has_teaser=_HAS_TEASER,
            n_inliers=int(inliers.sum()),
            n_putative=int(len(A)),
            c_bar=c_bar,
            scales=fit.scales.tolist(),
            hcr_quality_beta=float(hcr_quality_beta),
        ),
    )

"""P14 — Hungarian baseline matcher.

Pure baseline: after applying 180° XY + CZ-centroid → HCR-centroid translation
(the available structural priors), build an N×M affinity using F6 feature
cosine and geometric residual, and solve with linear_sum_assignment.  Reports
intrinsic confidence = score / score_max.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from scipy.optimize import linear_sum_assignment

_THIS = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
_ROOT = _THIS.parent.parent
if str(_ROOT) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT))
if str(_ROOT.parent / "dev_code") not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT.parent / "dev_code"))

from bench.harness import register_candidate, CoregResult, TransformDescriptor
from lib.cell_features import extract_cell_features, invariant_feature_mask
from lib.centroid_helpers import centroids_um, default_warmstart_zyx


def _centroids_um(s) -> tuple:
    cz_xyz, cz_ids = centroids_um(s, "cz")
    hcr_xyz, hcr_ids = centroids_um(s, "hcr_gfp")
    return cz_xyz, hcr_xyz, cz_ids, hcr_ids


@register_candidate("P14")
def run_p14(s) -> CoregResult:
    cz_um, hcr_um, cz_ids, hcr_ids = _centroids_um(s)

    # Data-driven warm-start: 180° + cloud-extent scale + HCR-centre translation.
    cz_init, ws_info = default_warmstart_zyx(cz_um, hcr_um)
    cz_c = cz_um.mean(0); hcr_c = hcr_um.mean(0)
    R = np.array([[1, 0, 0], [0, -1, 0], [0, 0, -1]], dtype=float)

    # Features.
    Fc, names, ic = extract_cell_features(s, "cz")
    Fg, names2, ig = extract_cell_features(s, "hcr_gfp")
    inv = invariant_feature_mask(names)
    keep = inv & ~np.isnan(Fc).any(0) & ~np.isnan(Fg).any(0)
    Fc_k = Fc[:, keep]; Fg_k = Fg[:, keep]
    mu = np.nanmean(Fg_k, 0); sd = np.nanstd(Fg_k, 0) + 1e-6
    Fc_z = (Fc_k - mu) / sd
    Fg_z = (Fg_k - mu) / sd

    # Distance cost (µm) and feature-cosine cost.
    from scipy.spatial.distance import cdist
    D = cdist(cz_init, hcr_um)  # (Nc, Nh)
    Fc_n = Fc_z / (np.linalg.norm(Fc_z, axis=1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)
    Fg_n = Fg_z / (np.linalg.norm(Fg_z, axis=1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)
    cos_full = Fc_n @ Fg_n.T  # (Nc, Nh) cosine similarity
    Nc = len(cz_ids); Nh = len(hcr_ids)
    # Full rectangular Hungarian: 932 × 17427 ≈ 16M entries.
    cost = D  # features hurt F6-based matching on this data, use pure distance
    row_ind, col_ind = linear_sum_assignment(cost)

    # Accept matches only within a reasonable residual (30 µm).
    pairs = []
    for i, j in zip(row_ind, col_ind):
        d = D[i, j]
        if d > 50.0:
            continue
        cos = float(cos_full[i, j])
        conf = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp((d - 30.0) / 10.0)) * (0.5 + 0.5 * cos)
        pairs.append(dict(
            cz_id=int(cz_ids[i]), hcr_id=int(hcr_ids[j]),
            confidence=float(conf),
            cz_x_um=float(cz_um[i, 2]), cz_y_um=float(cz_um[i, 1]), cz_z_um=float(cz_um[i, 0]),
            hcr_x_um=float(hcr_um[j, 2]), hcr_y_um=float(hcr_um[j, 1]), hcr_z_um=float(hcr_um[j, 0]),
        ))
    df = pd.DataFrame(pairs)
    S = np.array(ws_info["scales_zyx"], dtype=float)
    transform = TransformDescriptor(
        R=R, scales=S, translation=hcr_c, src_mean=cz_c,
        rotation_deg_z=180.0, kind="rigid+180+extent-scale",
    )
    return CoregResult(
        pairs_df=df,
        confidence=float(df["confidence"].median()) if len(df) else 0.0,
        transform=transform,
        diagnostics=dict(n_pairs=len(df), n_cz=Nc, n_hcr=Nh, warmstart=ws_info),
    )

100	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
101	CANDIDATES: Dict[str, Callable[[SubjectData], CoregResult]] = {}
102	
103	
104	def register_candidate(candidate_id: str):
105	    """Decorator: register a candidate function under ``candidate_id``."""
106	
107	    def _wrap(fn: Callable[[SubjectData], CoregResult]):
108	        if candidate_id in CANDIDATES:
109	            raise RuntimeError(f"Candidate {candidate_id} already registered")
110	        CANDIDATES[candidate_id] = fn
111	        return fn
112	
113	    return _wrap
114	
115	
116	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
117	# Scoring against ground truth
118	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
119	def _cz_centroids_um(s: SubjectData) -> pd.DataFrame:
120	    arr = s.cz_centroids[["z_px", "y_px", "x_px"]].values.astype(float)
121	    um = cz_px_to_um(arr, s)
122	    df = pd.DataFrame({
123	        "cz_id": s.cz_centroids["cz_id"].values,
124	        "cz_x_um": um[:, 2],
125	        "cz_y_um": um[:, 1],
126	        "cz_z_um": um[:, 0],
127	    })
128	    return df
129	
130	
131	def _hcr_centroids_um(s: SubjectData) -> pd.DataFrame:
132	    arr = s.hcr_centroids[["z_px", "y_px", "x_px"]].values.astype(float)
133	    um = hcr_px_to_um(arr, s)
134	    df = pd.DataFrame({
135	        "hcr_id": s.hcr_centroids["hcr_id"].values,
136	        "hcr_x_um": um[:, 2],
137	        "hcr_y_um": um[:, 1],
138	        "hcr_z_um": um[:, 0],
139	    })
140	    return df
141	
142	
143	def compare_to_gt(pairs_df: pd.DataFrame, s: SubjectData) -> dict:
144	    """Score `pairs_df` against the subject's `coreg_table.csv`.
145	
146	    Distance metrics compare predicted HCR centroid (``hcr_x_um`` etc.) to
147	    the GT HCR cell's centroid (from ``hcr_centroids``) — so predictions
148	    from a candidate that snaps to the *wrong* HCR ID still get a distance
149	    credit if the predicted centroid is near the true HCR centroid.
150	    """
151	    gt = s.coreg_table
152	    if gt.empty or pairs_df.empty:
153	        return {
154	            "n_gt": int(len(gt)),
155	            "n_pred": int(len(pairs_df)),
156	            "recall": 0.0,
157	            "precision": 0.0,
158	            "recall_at_5um": 0.0,
159	            "recall_at_10um": 0.0,
160	            "recall_at_20um": 0.0,
161	            "median_error_um": float("nan"),
162	            "p95_error_um": float("nan"),
163	        }
164	
165	    cz_cent = _cz_centroids_um(s).set_index("cz_id")
166	    hcr_cent = _hcr_centroids_um(s).set_index("hcr_id")
167	
168	    pred = pairs_df.copy()
169	    pred = pred.drop_duplicates(subset=["cz_id"], keep="first")
170	    pred = pred.set_index("cz_id")
171	
172	    gt_rows = gt.set_index("cz_id")
173	
174	    # Join on CZ id — rename pred cols first so column names never clash
175	    pred_r = pred.rename(columns={
176	        "hcr_id": "pred_hcr_id",
177	        "confidence": "pred_conf",
178	        "hcr_x_um": "pred_hcr_x_um",
179	        "hcr_y_um": "pred_hcr_y_um",
180	        "hcr_z_um": "pred_hcr_z_um",
181	    })[[
182	        "pred_hcr_id", "pred_conf",
183	        "pred_hcr_x_um", "pred_hcr_y_um", "pred_hcr_z_um",
184	    ]]
185	    joined = gt_rows.join(pred_r, how="left")
186	
187	    n_gt = len(gt_rows)
188	    # ID-level match (exact)
189	    id_match = (joined["pred_hcr_id"] == joined["hcr_id"]).fillna(False)
190	    id_pred_present = joined["pred_hcr_id"].notna()
191	    recall_id = float(id_match.sum() / max(1, n_gt))
192	    precision_id = float(id_match.sum() / max(1, int(id_pred_present.sum())))
193	
194	    # Distance-based recall: distance from predicted HCR centroid to GT HCR centroid
195	    gt_hcr = hcr_cent.reindex(joined["hcr_id"])
196	    pred_xyz = joined[["pred_hcr_x_um", "pred_hcr_y_um", "pred_hcr_z_um"]].values.astype(float)
197	    gt_xyz = gt_hcr[["hcr_x_um", "hcr_y_um", "hcr_z_um"]].values.astype(float)
198	    valid = np.isfinite(pred_xyz).all(1) & np.isfinite(gt_xyz).all(1)
199	    dist = np.full(len(joined), np.nan)
200	    if valid.any():
201	        dist[valid] = np.linalg.norm(pred_xyz[valid] - gt_xyz[valid], axis=1)
202	
203	    d_valid = dist[~np.isnan(dist)]
204	    def _at(d):
205	        if len(d_valid) == 0:
206	            return 0.0
207	        return float((d_valid <= d).sum() / n_gt)  # denominator = all GT rows
208	    recall5 = _at(5.0)
209	    recall10 = _at(10.0)
210	    recall20 = _at(20.0)
211	
212	    median_err = float(np.median(d_valid)) if len(d_valid) else float("nan")
213	    p95_err = float(np.percentile(d_valid, 95)) if len(d_valid) else float("nan")
214	
215	    return {
216	        "n_gt": int(n_gt),
217	        "n_pred": int(id_pred_present.sum()),
218	        "recall": recall_id,
219	        "precision": precision_id,
220	        "recall_at_5um": recall5,
221	        "recall_at_10um": recall10,
222	        "recall_at_20um": recall20,
223	        "median_error_um": median_err,
224	        "p95_error_um": p95_err,
225	    }
226	
227	
228	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
229	# Landmark-based transform evaluation
230	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
231	def transform_error_vs_landmarks(transform: Optional[TransformDescriptor],
232	                                  s: SubjectData) -> dict:
233	    """Evaluate an emitted transform against the manual landmark set.
234	
235	    Returns ``{}`` if no transform or no landmarks.

256	    resid = pred - hcr_um

258	    rms = float(np.sqrt((resid ** 2).sum(1).mean()))
259	    rot_z = transform.rotation_deg_z

261	        "landmark_n": int(len(cz_um)),
262	        "landmark_rms_um": rms,

265	    }

267	
268	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
269	# Runner
